title: Verify Gemini capability and sandbox boundary
goal: Verify whether Gemini can be used as local proposal-only review capacity before it is treated as an operational review lane.

metadata.safety_boundary: preflight only; no dispatch, merge, runtime mutation, repository mutation by Gemini, or automatic queue mutation

acceptance.assertion: Gemini runner availability is observed, or unavailability is recorded as a blocker.
A non-interactive execution mode and output capture path are documented or blocked.
The preflight documents which inputs Gemini may inspect and which sensitive values are excluded.
The preflight does not run Gemini with write, push, merge, runtime or repository mutation authority.
The later Gemini review lane is not treated as active capacity until this preflight is accepted.
